creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Here is a following update patch:
  lang/tcl81: 8.1b1 -> 8.1.1 (release version)
  x11-toolkit/tk81: 8.1b1 -> 8.1.1 (release version)
And include following enhancements:
1. apply Jan Nijtman's plus-patch.
  Original core Tcl/Tk is a "sample implementation". so there are many "lost features".
and it have some (many?:-) bugs. For this reason, Tcl community develops many number of
patches. many number of patches, itself is OK. But This is NOT good for FreeBSD ports.
Because maintenance will be hard ;-(
  But we got good solution. Jan Nijtman's plus-patch is it. Jan collect many number of
patches, remove conflicts, and resolve licence probrems. plus-patch is under "licence.
term". This licence is same as Core Tcl/Tk, and very near to FreeBSD licence, and Jan
said "There are no probrems".
  Additionaly, plus-patch now inclueds SRA's I18N_IMPROVE patch. This means Tk now supports
XIM. Japanese, Chinese, Korean?, and the other peoples can input thier languages using XIM.
  Offcause, This changes are 100% upwards compatible with the corresponding ports.
  for more details, see http://home.wxs.nl/~nijtmans/plus.html.

2. configure.in patch, insted of configure patch
  corresponding patch is good enogh. but I like this one :)

3. x11-toolkit/tk81 now supports "make test"
  lang/tcl81 now install libtcltest.a. This is for "make test" under x11-toolkit/tk81.

Fix: Would you like to check/commit following patches > Justin ?
I've tested "make install deinstall reinstall package" and used portlint.
It's seem work fine.

Thanks.
